three_layer_analysis.l1_daily: D1 bullish: predominantly HH/HL from May 18 low 28596.3 to Jun 2 high 30760.2 (+7.5%, 8 of 9 transitions HH/HL; one break May 26→27 LH/LL). Jun 2 D1 candle: small bullish body (53.8pts, 24% of range), close at 99.6% of daily range (near high), long lower wick 167.3pts showing buy-side absorption. Bullish SMT at Jun 2 swing high: NAS100 made HH (30760.2>30729.2) while US500 failed to HH (7611.0<7621.3) — ES showed relative weakness at the top. Price at 30254 = 76.6% of dealing range (deep Premium). Current pullback from ATH is -1.6%.
three_layer_analysis.l2_h4_context: H4 pullback from Jun 2 high 30760: consecutive lower highs/lows since Jun 2 17:00 NY. Price broke below H4 61.8% (30423) and H4 38.2% (30552) of pullback range (30760→30215, range 545pts). Bearish FVG at 30315-30319 (Jun 4 05:00) — price currently testing this level. Bearish FVG above at 30664-30670 (Jun 3 13:00 NY displacement). Jun 3 09:00 NY candle was the key displacement down (-110 body, swept Asian H 30766). No active bullish OB below price — nearest is Jun 1 09:00 at 30256 (already tested).
three_layer_analysis.l3_m15_entry: M15: sell-off accelerated during London KZ (04:00-05:00 NY), found low at 30215.1 at 05:15 NY. Post-low: weak bounce to 30278, then retested 30236. Current: 30254, consolidating near lows. London KZ (02:00-05:00 NY): CLOSED. NY AM KZ (08:30-11:00 NY): CLOSED, opens in ~3h. No M15 OB forming yet — waiting for NY AM displacement to confirm direction. Compression visible in 05:30-06:30 NY candles (narrow 40pt range after 300pt sell-off).
three_layer_analysis.l4_orb_score: Pre-Market/HTF Bias: 12/25 (D1 bullish but overnight sweep+sell). VWAP: N/A pre-market. Volume: 8/20 (M15 London accel visible). Candle/Timing: 5/15 (London closed, NY not open). ICT/CRT: 6/15 (bullish SMT at top=ES weakness, FVG at price). Range Width: 7/10 (1.8%, slightly wide). Total: 38/100 — LOW conviction.

reasoning: D1 trend remains strongly bullish with predominantly HH/HL structure from May 18 swing low 28596.3 to Jun 2 high 30760.2 (8 of 9 transitions HH/HL; one break May 26→27 LH/LL). However, price is at 76.6% of dealing range (deep Premium), making it vulnerable to pullback. The current H4 pullback (-506pts from ATH, -1.6%) has broken below H4 38.2% and 61.8% of the pullback range. Price is currently at 30254, testing the D1 23.6% Fib (30250) and a bearish H4 FVG (30315-30319). Bullish SMT at Jun 2 swing high: NAS100 made HH (30760.2 > 30729.2) while ES failed to HH (7611.0 < 7621.3) — ES showed relative weakness at the top, suggesting NQ may be overextended. This supports the pullback thesis. Key decision point: if price holds 30215-30250 through NY AM open, look for long entries toward H4 FVG fill at 30552-30664. If 30215 breaks, target D1 38.2% at 29934. ICT Weekly Profile: Thursday Reversal potential — after Mon expansion, Tue-Wed consolidation, Thursday could set the reversal low before Fri continuation. But this is NOT confirmed — price could continue lower. Wait for NY AM Kill Zone (08:30 ET) displacement before committing to direction. Current ORB score 38/100 = low conviction, pre-market. Confidence 40/100 = honest assessment of mixed signals (bullish D1 vs bearish H4/M15 pullback).
